measurement_note: Size is n, the target distance and the number of forward states reached before the answer on this workload. Each tier uses unit forward/backward jumps and a distant irrelevant forbidden position. The Accepted hash-set BFS and an independent boolean-array BFS take O(n) time. A correct BFS that stores visited direction states in a linear list takes O(n^2), completes all 32/128/512 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
